title: Comfort Creations Honeysuckle & Sandalwood Fabric Conditioner with Stay Fresh technology for 100 days of freshness + fragrance* 83 washes (2.49 L)
features: Enjoy 100 days of freshness + fragrance* with Comfort Creations Honeysuckle & Sandalwood Fabric Conditioner
This bottle of Comfort features Stay Fresh technology which is designed to lock in fragrance to give clothes 100 days of freshness*
Our Honeysuckle & Sandalwood fabric conditioner leaves your clothes with the sensational long-lasting fragrance notes of honeysuckle with juicy tangerine and a sweet vanilla base
Let our clothes conditioner whisk you away to an evening on an exotic island – the aroma of this luxurious, alluring scent will make you feel like a movie star, whatever the occasion
Comfort Fabric Conditioner helps to smooth the fibres of your clothes, making them feel extra soft, and it comes in a recyclable bottle**
Let the fresh fragrance bursts of this Comfort Fabric Conditioner take you to a happy place because when your clothes smell good, you feel good – all day long
description: Product Description We know you love your clothes. We love clothes too, and we want to help you to care for them. That’s why we’ve developed Comfort Creations Honeysuckle & Sandalwood Fabric Conditioner to keep clothes fragrant and clean long after each wash. Our fabric softener features Stay Fresh technology, which is designed to lock in fragrance to deliver 100 days of freshness + fragrance*. This fabric softener features a long-lasting fragrance combining honeysuckle, juicy tangerine and sweet vanilla base to leave your clothes smelling fragrant and clean long after each wash. Let the fresh fragrance burst of Comfort Fabric Conditioner take you to a happy place because when your clothes smell good, you feel good – all day long. How to use: Dose straight into your washing machine drawer. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Wash hands after use. You do not need to dilute. Add Comfort to your wash to help protect your clothes and leave you feeling great inside and outside every day. Comfort is the original fabric conditioner in the UK and has been caring for clothes for over 50 years. Comfort Fabric Conditioner also ensures your clothes smell their very best, wash after wash. Together, we can help protect the clothes you love. *After storage and line drying **Remove sleeve Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic Surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Amyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate. Directions 1. Pour the recommended amount of fabric softener into the fabric softener dispenser in your washing machine before starting the wash cycle, or add it directly to the wash cycle along with the detergent. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
